title: Supply Chain Manager - SFC Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - SFC Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!
